all_news_section.headline: Aaj ki sabse badi aur impactful market headline — engaging, concise, Hinglish mein.
all_news_section.summary: Pichle 24 ghante ka complete global market breakdown. Kya bada hua, kyun hua, aur markets par kya asar pada — sab kuch Hinglish mein detail mein likhna hai. Minimum 200 words. USD, equities, bonds, commodities, crypto, aur geopolitics ka overall narrative cover karo.

high_impact_events.event_name: #1 HIGHEST IMPACT — e.g. FOMC Rate Decision / NFP / CPI Surprise
high_impact_events.impact_explanation: Domain (A/B/...) — Sabse market-moving event pehle. Is event se market par kya asar padne wala hai — kaunse symbols directly affect honge, kya direction expect karo, aur kya specific levels pe nazar rakhna hai. Minimum 80 words, Hinglish mein.

high_impact_events.event_name: #2 — Global Central Bank Speech or Decision
high_impact_events.impact_explanation: Domain B — Fed/ECB/BoE/BoJ/RBA/RBNZ/SNB/BoC/PBoC/RBI. Specific statement ya decision ka market impact detail mein.
Domain A — GDP, PCE, retail sales, ISM, PPI, trade balance. Actual numbers vs expectations aur market reaction.
Domain C — Active conflict, sanction, trade war, election result. Specific country aur market impact.
Domain D — S&P 500, Nasdaq, DAX, Nikkei ya Hang Seng ka significant move aur uska FX/commodity ripple.
Domain E — US 10Y/2Y yield, JGB, Bund. Specific basis point move, yield curve shape change, credit spread widening.
Domain F — WTI/Brent, natural gas, copper, iron ore. OPEC decision, supply shock, demand data — aur CAD/AUD/NOK par direct impact.
Domain G — ETF flows, COMEX positioning, central bank buying, real yield change. XAUUSD aur XAGUSD ke specific levels.
Domain H — BTC/ETH spot ETF flows, on-chain accumulation, regulatory news, exchange listing. Specific price levels aur implications.
Domain I — China PMI, PBoC action, trade balance, Japan CPI/wages. AUD, NZD, JPY ke liye direct market impact.
Domain J — Intervention warning, CFTC net positioning change, carry trade unwind, options expiry. Specific currency pairs affected.

high_impact_events.event_name: #12 — Second Central Bank or Rate Decision
high_impact_events.impact_explanation: Domain B — Another major central bank event from the past 24 hours. Minutes, speech, or surprise policy shift.
Domain A — Another key US economic release — jobs data, housing, consumer confidence, etc.
Domain I — RBI decision, India CPI/GDP, Brazil, South Africa, Turkey, Mexico key data. Impact on INR, BRL, ZAR crosses.
Domain C — Another geopolitical flashpoint — different region or angle from #4. Oil supply risk, sanctions impact, etc.
Domain D — Another major index or sector move. Earnings shock, IPO, sector rotation that moved markets.
Domain D/F — Major earnings report (e.g. big tech, bank, commodity giant) or M&A that moved broader markets.
Domain F — LNG prices, pipeline flow, energy supply disruption. Impact on CAD, NOK, AUD.
Domain G/F — Silver, copper, aluminum, nickel — EV demand, manufacturing PMI, China construction data impact.
Domain H — Altcoin move, DeFi protocol news, SEC/CFTC action, stablecoin development, exchange news.
Domain B/I — BoJ intervention risk, JGB yield cap, Japan trade/wage data. USDJPY ke liye specific risk levels.
Domain I — RBA/RBNZ decision or data. Australia employment, NZ GDP, dairy prices. AUD/NZD specific impact.
Domain A/B — UK CPI, GDP, PMI, or Eurozone inflation, manufacturing. GBP/USD, EUR/USD specific levels.
Domain J — CFTC Commitments of Traders, IMM net positions, major options expiry at key strikes. Smart money ka current stance.
Any remaining significant market-moving event from today's real news — sovereign rating change, unexpected data, flash crash, breaking news. Real aur specific hona chahiye.

latest_headlines: Gold se related latest headline 1 — specific price action ya catalyst mention karo
Gold se related latest headline 2 — another key development
XAUUSD.detailed_breakdown: Gold mein pichle 24 ghante mein kya bada news movement hua. Dollar index ka kya impact raha, real yields ne kya kiya, ETF flows kaisi thi, COMEX positioning kya bol rahi hai, aur session open hote hi kya expect karna hai — sab kuch detailed Hinglish mein. Minimum 120 words.
XAUUSD.trader_alert: Retail traders ke liye ek important, urgent note ya warning — Hinglish mein. Key level, risk event, ya positioning advice jo is specific symbol ke liye critical hai right now.
